notes: tier-2 residual = GPU-f32 chaos-game spatial diffuseness (walker measure slightly more diffuse than flam3-C), minimized via the walker jitter (1e-10); NOT a variation-kernel precision floor. See #6 / #10 (2026-05-31 re-baseline).
calibration: Median of 3 pyr3 runs vs flam3-C golden at jitter 1e-10, 2026-05-31. thresholdR = expectedR + 1.0. tier 2 if expectedR >= 5.0.
